params.name: MoCA
params.description:
In 2004, Ziad Nasreddine developed Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA) based on his clinical experience.
MoCA is widely used for detecting cognitive impairment and is a must-have tool for Alzheimer's treatment, which includes eight cognitive domains and eleven examinations. It is very suitable for clinical application because its high sensitivity and short testing time can help locate the patient cognition state shortly.
